AntiDengueRunRequest.description:
Legacy endpoint contract retained for rollback compatibility.

The web dashboard and scheduler no longer use dry_run=False. New sends always
originate from a successful dry run and an immutable approved preview.
AntiDengueRunRequest.title: AntiDengueRunRequest

ReportingRouteSetupInput.description: One guided transaction for a complete group reporting route.
ReportingRouteSetupInput.title: ReportingRouteSetupInput

constraints.name: ck_whatsapp_audience_members_target
constraints.sqltext: (target_type = 'group' AND directory_group_id IS NOT NULL AND directory_contact_id IS NULL) OR (target_type = 'contact' AND directory_contact_id IS NOT NULL AND directory_group_id IS NULL)

constraints.name: ck_whatsapp_contact_links_entity
constraints.sqltext: (entity_type = 'officer' AND officer_id IS NOT NULL AND school_head_id IS NULL) OR (entity_type = 'school_head' AND school_head_id IS NOT NULL AND officer_id IS NULL)
